zh.Leek, Staffordshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾利可
zh.Balterley, Newcastle Under Lyme, Staffor: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾紐可亞斯特爾 武安德 萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Godwine of Mercia於0979年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾紐可亞斯特爾 武安德 萊時，他的父親Leofwine of Mercia, Ealdorman of the Hwicce29歲，母親AElfwara Æthelsdotter of York33歲。他於1008年與Goda在英國斯塔福爾利可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1039年在英國斯塔福爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.Leek, Staffordshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾利可
zh-hans.Balterley, Newcastle Under Lyme, Staffor: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾紐可亞斯特爾 武安德 萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godwine of Mercia于0979年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾紐可亞斯特爾 武安德 萊时，他的父亲Leofwine of Mercia, Ealdorman of the Hwicce29岁，母亲AElfwara Æthelsdotter of York33岁。他于1008年与Goda在英国斯塔福爾利可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1039年在英国斯塔福爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Mercia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Alessandro, Arcangelo, Vito.
Italian (Sicily): feminine form Meccio, which is probably a nickname from Sicilian mecciu ‘curl’, ‘ringlet’.

nameMeanings.name: Godwine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old English personal name Godwine, derived from god ‘god’ + wine ‘friend’. This was borne in the 11th century by the Earl of Wessex, the most important man in England after the king. He was an influential adviser to successive kings of England, and father of the King Harold who was defeated at Hastings in 1066 . The personal name continued in use after the Norman Conquest long enough to give rise to a surname. Modern use as a given name is probably a transferred use of the surname, rather than a revival of the Old English name.

historicEvents.title: Vikings Invade England
historicEvents.description: Viking raiders from Scandinavia invaded England in 980. Years later in 991, the English government paid them 10,000 in hopes for peace. The Viking raiders, however, continued to force more money from England.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: When Godwine of Mercia was born in 0979, in Newcastle under Lyme, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Leofwine of Mercia, Ealdorman of the Hwicce, was 29 and his mother, AElfwara Æthelsdotter of York, was 33. He married Goda in 1008, in Leek, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1039, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godwine of Mercia est né en 0979, à Newcastle under Lyme, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Leofwine of Mercia, Ealdorman of the Hwicce, avait 29 ans et sa mère, AElfwara Æthelsdotter of York, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Goda en 1008, à Leek, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1039, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

Er hat 1008 in Leek, Staffordshire, England Goda geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1039 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Godwine of Merciaが0979年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアニューカストル ウンダー リメで生まれた時，父Leofwine of Mercia, Ealdorman of the Hwicceは29歳，母AElfwara Æthelsdotter of Yorkは33歳であった。1008年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアリークでGodaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1039年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.Balterley, Newcastle Under Lyme, Staffor: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뉴카스틀 운더 림
ko.lifeSummary: Godwine of Mercia(이)가 0979년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뉴카스틀 운더 림에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Leofwine of Mercia, Ealdorman of the Hwicce(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 AElfwara Æthelsdotter of York(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1008년 영국 스태퍼드실르 리크에서 Goda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1039년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godwine of Mercia родился в 0979 г. в местности нюкастл ундир лим, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Leofwine of Mercia, Ealdorman of the Hwicce было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали AElfwara Æthelsdotter of York, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Goda в 1008 г. в местности лик, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1039 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.
